files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections that were merged together. The lessons cover Theology/Testimony, Book of Mormon testimony, Literature (Tennyson), and Health/Personal Hygiene. Each lesson has its own questions section. There appears to be some OCR confusion at the beginning where Lesson I content may be mixed with Lesson II header.
